titleStmt.title: SII 25.79: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 79. (A.R. No. 79 of 1908.) VEḌĀL, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Nīlakaṇṭhēśvara temple.

This undated epigraph is engraved in characters of about the 15th Century. It records a short deed of agreement (śiṟu-muṟi) issued (by the temple authorities) in the name of the deity Ādichaṇḍīśvara along with a certain Kuñjaramallar to the army (śēṉai) called kaivalāṉ Taṉiy-āmaivallāṉ-śēṉai Kāchchukaṭṭi-Aṉṟuvarāgaṇḍaṉ regarding the grant of sites (maṉai) (the boundaries of which are specific) as a kāṇi from the month of Avaṇi in the above year to the temple of Kaṟaikaṇṭhīśvaram-uḍaiyanāyiṉār of Viḍāl. Among the boundaries specified in the record, the temple of Sambandap-perumāḷ-nāyaṉār is situated to the south of the gift land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Āti caṇṭēcuraṉ tiruvāy malantaruḷiṉapaṭikku . kuñcura mallarkku ciṟumuṟi viṭāl Uṭaiyārāṉa
kaṟai kaṇṭīcuramuṭaiya nāyiṉār tirunāmattuk kāṇi paritāpi varuṣāmRead varuṣamĀvaṇi mātam mutal
taṅkaḷukku teruvāka campantapperumāḷ nāyaṉār koyilukku vaṭakku kiḻciṟaku maṭamāka mukkol
kaṟai viṭṭu vaṭakkum mel ciṟaku kallukku vaṭakkum vāṇiyan vāṉiṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭakku
kaḻaṉikkālukku teṟkum kiḻakku tirunaṉtavaṉattukku meṟkum Uṭpaṭṭa maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭaippai
yum kaivalāṉa taṉiyāṇmai vallāṉ kāccukaṭṭi . Aṉṟu varākaṇṭaṉ ceṉaikkum
Ivarkaḷukku kāṇi Āka kuṭuttom § .
Digital edition of SII 25.79 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
